stemHtml: Can the pilot give access to the aircraft documentation to someone representing the competent authority?

options.a: The commander should ask for the permission of their superior in order to show the aircraft documentation.
options.b: The pilot can grant full access to the aircraft documentation to anyone asking for it since they are of public concern.
options.c: The pilot can grant them full access to the aircraft documentation as they represent the competent authority.
options.d: The pilot must deny access to the aircraft documentation.
